\tzpentry{ID3980}{Angular Velocity Divergence Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3980 introduces Angular Velocity Divergence Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\Omega^\top = \nabla \cdot \mathbf{F}_t$
\]
